channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Numerous large potholes- very dangerous!, 13th April
item.description:
These potholes have been here for months and are getting worse. Today a car swerved infront of me nearly causing an accident to avoid them at 60 mph! This is dangerously close to causing an accident at speed. It is my daily commute and many drivers are switching lanes last minute to avoid wrecking their car. Please do something about this!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 streetlights permanently out., 13th April
item.description:
The last report was closed without explanation. I have since found the council believe the school to be responsible, however the responsibility for the asset remains with the council. Th school is now running so it is no longer a CDM site with a principal contractor so any previous agreements have lapsed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting not working constantly out and causing serious problems parking at night, 13th April
item.description:
102 beeches road Gl53 8nx
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balcarras, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 13th April
item.description:
Traffic lights only working oin the one direction out of town not working. Pedestrian Lights activating but traffic is still coming.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Parking bays, double yellows and dropped kerb markings need repainting. There’s a nursery on the road and parents have been parking across driveways, on the pavement blocking them. It’s not safe for pedestrians, and cars could get damaged as the road is narrow and cars parking where they shouldn’t makes it difficult to turn etc, 13th April
item.description:
The whole of Fairmount Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Fairmount Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes all along the road, 13th April
item.description:
Near school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bicycle, 13th April
item.description:
At junction of Westbury road and Old Bath Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265, Old Bath Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham

item.title: Tree fallen, blocking garages, 13th April
item.description:
Off the side road infront of garages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Marsh Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: Loose manhole cover bangs every time someone drives over it- I can hear it from my house on Evesham Rd, 13th April
item.description:
Manhole cover on the crossroads between Clarence Rd and North Place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 m long pothole which is up to 40cm wide, 13th April
item.description:
/// gestures.hoops.halt

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Lane, Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Elongated pothole, 13th April
item.description:
Exit of roundabout lh lane onto A40 on right hand side of that lane elongated pothole approx 700mmx 300mm x40 or 50mm depth. Potentially lethal to a motorcyclist. I see it's been reported many times since 2025 and still not addressed as not paint marked. Utterly unacceptable to be so slow to inspect even though it is in a difficult location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole in car park, 13th April
item.description:
Large pot hole to the left hand side of the car park alongside the fencing. in a parking spot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherborne Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large section of the gutter giving way, 13th April
item.description:
A series of repeated issues as you approach Gotherington. The gutter is sagging and potholes force cars to cross the centre of the road to avoid damage. This is obviously dangerous when there is oncoming traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous Large Holes, 13th April
item.description:
There are numerous holes in the road. These have existed for well over 2 months with no action. Please resurface before someone get injured.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Fields, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 13th April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway over riding with aburt level difference footway closure 1600x700x25mm tarmac parch stats required (FW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The no cycling sign at the London Rd end of the footpath is missing, 13th April
item.description:
The no cycling sign at the London Rd end of the footpath disappeared some time ago and needs to be replaced to discourage people from cycling along the footpath (which happens regularly)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 13th April
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 1000x1060x65mm Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 13th April

Customer reporting 2 very large potholes in close proximity to each other.
